Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Market Master Pro
Punchline: Manual market intelligence and arbitrage scanner for FFXIV.
Description: Analyzes market opportunities with Universalis data, watchlists, velocity filters, and manual undercut helpers. All actions are manual. Now includes real-time undercut notifications.
Changelog: v1.1.25: Optimized consumables scan to top 250 items, eliminating 100+ API batches and ensuring smooth progress updates. Consumables mode now scans efficiently while covering potions, food, materials, and common ingredients. All v1.1.24 features retained (consumables mode, actual progress display, resizable columns).
